items.title: Justin Edwards was inside the Sixers’ practice facility when the Jaylen Brown trade popped…and still found out from the TV.
items.author: Gina Mizell
items.body_excerpt:
Justin Edwards was inside the Sixers’ practice facility when the Jaylen Brown trade popped…and still found out from the TV. 

VJ Edgecombe was at a spa in his native Bahamas. Dalen Terry was taking a nap. 

A roundup of the Sixers’ reaction to the stunning trade👇🏻

www.inquirer.com/sixers/sixer...

media.title: What the Sixers are saying about the Jaylen Brown trade, from ‘Oh, snap!’ to ‘It’s going to be special’
media.description: There were entertaining stories about how various Sixers found out about the blockbuster trade, illustrating how stunning the move was even to those close to it.

items.title: Dalen Terry and Justin Edwards also have joined the crew.
items.author: Gina Mizell
items.body_excerpt: Dalen Terry and Justin Edwards also have joined the crew.
